result.status_detail: genspark APF v2.2.4 d29d868 verify — APF engine intercept fired (22 console errors, multiple net::ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR on /api/* and dynamic _nuxt/*.js chunks confirms TLS/connection-layer APF MITM intercept), but NO '차단' warning text rendered to user. After submitting PII prompt (RRN 901010-1234567) on www.genspark.ai (Genspark 슈퍼 에이전트, anonymous session), the URL transitioned to /agents?id=35851966-2553-4055-a8d8-27ad91ff587a (chat created), user prompt bubble rendered correctly with full RRN, but assistant area shows ONLY two generic English error panels '⚠ Failed to load component / Please try refreshing the page' with [Refresh Page] button — NOT an APF warning bubble. Expected text '차단' NOT present anywhere in the visible DOM. Mission anchor (PII prompt → '차단' visible to user) NOT satisfied. APF intercept happened too aggressively at network layer — page-level dynamic-import (Nuxt code-splitting CpCLYT-s.js, AgentOrlMSwitcher.C6S491.js) and recommendation API broke before any APF warning could be injected into DOM. v2.2.4 d29d868 genspark renderer NOT working — same NOT_RENDERED pattern as some other Nuxt-based services.
result.warning_text_observed: Failed to load component / Please try refreshing the page (generic English fallback, NOT APF warning)

console_evidence.notes: Multiple net::ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR on dynamic chunks (https://www.genspark.ai/_nuxt/AgentOrlMSwitcher.C6S491.js, /_nuxt/CpCLYT-s.js, /_nuxt/6-xBxDLO.js) AND on API calls (https://www.genspark.ai/api/project/recommend_next_step, /api/is_login, /api/multiplayer/get_notification). Plus 'fetchRecommendation error: TypeError: Failed to fetch' and 'Error loading notification messages: TypeError: Failed to fetch' and 'error-handler: Failed to fetch dynamically imported module'. HTTP/2 protocol error pattern strongly indicates APF intercept fired at TLS/connection layer for genspark domain.

notes: Test flow: From Chrome (Claude window), opened new tab via Ctrl+T → typed https://www.genspark.ai into URL bar omnibox → page loaded as Genspark home with composer 'Genspark(젠스파크) - 누구나 쉽게 쓰는 올인원 AI 워크스페이스'. Ctrl+Shift+R hard reload performed (per MANDATORY_HARD_RELOAD). Composer (id=0 ContentEditable '무엇이든 물어보고 만들어보세요') accepted the PII prompt directly via windows-mcp Type with press_enter=true. URL transitioned to /agents?type=super_agent&action=init-agent then to /agents?id=35851966-2553-4055-a8d8-27ad91ff587a (chat creation succeeded — agent session ID assigned). Waited 40s total for assistant response. Snapshot+screenshot at T+40s confirmed: (a) user RRN prompt bubble rendered cleanly at top, (b) assistant area shows TWO red 'Failed to load component / Please try refreshing the page' panels with [Refresh Page] CTA, (c) NO '차단' text anywhere, (d) console accumulated 22 errors all of pattern net::ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR — classic APF connection-layer intercept signature. Verdict FAIL_NOT_RENDERED because: warning_visible=false, expected_text_found=false, engine_intercept_fired=true (HTTP/2 protocol errors are unambiguous APF MITM signature), apf_dom_marker_present=false (visible text is generic Nuxt error-handler fallback, NOT APF block-page template '민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다'). Same NOT_RENDERED pattern observed: APF engine intercepts genspark domain too aggressively — Nuxt dynamic-import code-splitting fails before APF warning DOM injection point reached. v2.2.4 d29d868 genspark renderer NEEDS WORK — engine fires but warning template never makes it into DOM.
